description: Sanitized scanner outputs generated from repository fixtures. These files show real PermitGraph decisions without publishing private repositories or generated local state.

fixtures.label: Blocked CI automation
fixtures.why: A pull_request_target workflow grants write permissions and references a token.

fixtures.label: MCP credential review
fixtures.why: A local MCP server receives a credential reference and uses an unpinned package command.

name: PermitGraph public fixture scans
